title: Developmental services: initial intake: assessment.
notes: Real California bill amending WIC intake and assessment timelines. Should at minimum surface the currently operative WIC sections it would displace.

title: Employment: work hours: flexible work schedules.
notes: Real California labor bill allowing individual 10-hour workdays within a 40-hour week without daily overtime. Should conflict with current LAB 510, but not with the federal 40-hour weekly overtime floor.

title: Agricultural workers: overtime compensation.
notes: Real California labor bill raising the weekly overtime trigger for agricultural workers from 40 to 48 hours. Should conflict with current LAB 860.

title: Employees: meal periods.
notes: Real enacted California meal-period bill that changes an exception in LAB 512 for water-corporation employees.

title: Minimum wages: persons with disabilities.
notes: Real enacted California bill phasing out special licenses that allowed subminimum wages. The current California code corpus still contains LAB 1191, but repealed LAB 1191.5 is no longer present as a live section, so the benchmark checks the retrievable current section only.
